description: From Leipzig by express train to Hanover, then via Löhne, Hamm, Bielefeld, Münster. Waiting for the next train on a meadow outside town. Münster pretty well finished off.

V2 position further north than in 1939. Paymaster's office in a schoolhouse. Constant air-raid alarms. Two looting trips to Arnhem (Holland) after the English airborne attack. Guard of honor during a Speer visit at Schloss Vallar.

V2 is being fired at London from the Scheveningen pier. Lives in a villa in a park-like suburb, room with glass doors to the garden. Library with forbidden books (Mann, Feuchtwanger). Assigned as NS-Richtmann (National Socialist guidance officer).
